list-min-width.$description: Floor for the list pane as it is resized. Deliberately NOT --pv-sidebar-width, which is also 220px: that one is the NAV sidebar, sized in #962 against its own header content. The two coincide today by accident, and tying them together would move the nav rail whenever the list floor changed.

inbox-inspector-width.$description: Inbox inspector pane. Was referenced as var(--pv-inbox-inspector-width, 320px) against a token that never existed, so the fallback was the only value it ever had.

inbox-breakdown-width.$description: Inbox breakdown pane; same phantom-reference history as the inspector width.
